top_signals.title: Americas Gold stock swap ends Sprott silver stream burden
top_signals.summary: It will issue 7.96 million common shares to Sprott Mining at a price of $5.57 apiece to cancel the remaining obligation to ship 592,000 oz. silver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
top_signals.summary: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions
top_signals.summary: A Pokémon card boom is being driven by nostalgia, blockbuster card sales and speculation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: McEwen says San José mine cash generation blew past expectations
top_signals.summary: Total dividends from San José has now reached $58.2 million, surpassing its original target of $40-50 million for 2026.
